title: Karnataka High Court calls for strict age checks at pubs to keep out minors
description: The Karnataka High Court on Wednesday emphasised that establishments serving liquor including breweries must ensure strict age-verification of its customers, whether through Aadhaar checks or otherwise, before permitting their entry into such places. Justice M Nagraprasanna held that such establishments cannot view age verification of their customers are empty formalities. "Breweries and similar establishments, which have proliferated in urban spaces must initiate rigorous age verification proto
